_instructions: Maps internal user UUIDs to display names for ops/AR/field-tech surfaces. Populate by pulling user list from portal.theroofdocs.com /api/users endpoint, or by hand as new IDs appear. Lookup key is the UUID; value is { name, role } where role is one of 'fieldTech' | 'collector' | 'estimator' | 'projectCoordinator' | 'salesRep'. Leaving a key absent makes the UI fall back to 'FT <last-8>' or similar truncation.
